keyboard_issues.description: No skip-navigation link found. Keyboard users must tab through all navigation items to reach main content.
keyboard_issues.recommendation: Add a visually-hidden skip link at the top of the page: Skip to main content

keyboard_issues.description: Element <button> receives focus but has no visible focus indicator.
keyboard_issues.recommendation: Add CSS focus styles: outline: 2px solid #005fcc; outline-offset: 2px;

keyboard_issues.description: Element <button> receives focus but has no visible focus indicator.
keyboard_issues.recommendation: Add CSS focus styles: outline: 2px solid #005fcc; outline-offset: 2px;

keyboard_issues.description: Element <button> receives focus but has no visible focus indicator.
keyboard_issues.recommendation: Add CSS focus styles: outline: 2px solid #005fcc; outline-offset: 2px;

screen_reader_issues.description: No <h1> heading found. Screen readers rely on headings to convey page structure.
screen_reader_issues.recommendation: Add a single <h1> element describing the main page purpose.

screen_reader_issues.description: Heading hierarchy skips levels (1 skips detected). Screen reader users may lose context.
screen_reader_issues.recommendation: Maintain sequential heading levels (h1 → h2 → h3) without skipping.

screen_reader_issues.description: No <main> landmark found. Screen reader users cannot quickly navigate to primary content.
screen_reader_issues.recommendation: Wrap the primary content area in a <main> element.

screen_reader_issues.description: 3 image(s) lack alt text. Screen readers cannot describe these to users.
screen_reader_issues.recommendation: Add descriptive alt attributes. Use alt='' for decorative images with role='presentation'.

screen_reader_issues.description: 2 button(s) have no accessible name. Screen readers will announce them as 'button' with no context.
screen_reader_issues.recommendation: Add text content, aria-label, or aria-labelledby to each button.

screen_reader_issues.description: 5 form input(s) have no associated label.
screen_reader_issues.recommendation: Associate each input with a <label for='id'> or use aria-label.

screen_reader_issues.description: 1 aria-hidden region(s) contain focusable elements. Keyboard users can reach elements that screen readers cannot announce.
screen_reader_issues.recommendation: Remove focusable children from aria-hidden regions or set tabindex='-1'.

functional_issues.description: Page uses animations but does not respect prefers-reduced-motion media query.
functional_issues.recommendation: Add @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { * { animation: none !important; transition: none !important; } }

functional_issues.description: Page does not declare a language. Screen readers need lang attribute to determine pronunciation.
Viewport meta tag disables user zooming. Users with low vision cannot enlarge content.
functional_issues.recommendation: Remove maximum-scale=1 and user-scalable=no from viewport meta tag.
